archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Clean Fintech / Stripe-like aesthetic
rationale: For a B2B payment infrastructure app, trust and clarity are paramount. A clean, high-contrast light theme with soft functional accents mimics top-tier fintechs (like Stripe). It prioritizes data legibility and operational confidence without feeling clinical.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The Control Room Protocol: Dense, structured grids for dashboards. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 or 4. gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Clay & Crisp. Use white surfaces (bg-white) on a soft off-white background (bg-slate-50). Elements should have a soft ambient shadow (shadow-sm) combined with a crisp 1px border (border-black/5 or border-slate-200) to separate them. No muddy gray shadows.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Interactive cards should lift slightly (-translate-y-[2px]) and increase shadow to shadow-md. Transition durations should be fast (duration-200 ease-out).
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: Strictly use ring-2 ring-slate-900 ring-offset-2 for keyboard accessibility. No default browser outlines.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Staggered fade-up animations (Framer Motion). Elements enter by moving from y: 10 to y: 0, opacity 0 to 1.
interactions_and_motion.micro_interactions: Risk score calculators should use circular progress gauges that animate from 0 to the final value.

components_instructions.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800. Secondary buttons: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50. Ghost buttons for tertiary actions.
components_instructions.badges: Risk badges must use the risk_levels soft background and dark text colors. px-3 py-1 text-xs rounded-full flex items-center gap-1.5 (include a 6px colored dot).
components_instructions.cards: Use Shadcn Card component but override border to border-slate-200 and shadow to shadow-sm. Use generous padding.
components_instructions.timeline: For delivery tracking, use a vertical or horizontal layout. Active steps have brand_primary circles, inactive have border-slate-300. Use a solid 2px line connecting them. For High-Risk flows, show a 'Locked' icon in the timeline.
components_instructions.navigation: Minimal top bar. White background, border-b border-slate-200, crisp typography. Stick to the top with z-50.
components_instructions.data_display: For the Journey Summary Table, left-align text. Use subtle bg-slate-50 for table headers.

payment_concept.description: Modern minimalist floating credit card, useful for the Payment Screen hero or side panel.

buyer.description: Professional portrait for the buyer trust badge.

seller.description: Professional portrait for the seller trust badge.

products.name: MacBook Pro M3 Max
products.description: High-value physical goods flow (OTP + video + checklist)

testing_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, tabs, risk cards) and key informational displays MUST include a descriptive data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='buyer-trust-badge', data-testid='place-order-button').

flow_specific_instructions.1_order_screen: Feature a prominent Product Card alongside Buyer & Seller trust badges. Use the avatars provided. Incorporate a dynamic Risk Score display (e.g., a sleek gauge or colored progress bar depending on the selected product).
flow_specific_instructions.2_payment_screen: Design a clean Payment Panel UI. Map the payment status based on risk level. Use subtle success/warning/error colors on the status badge: Low -> Captured (Green), Medium -> Authorized (Yellow), High -> Held (Red).
flow_specific_instructions.3_delivery_tracking: Implement a visually clear timeline mapping out: Order placed -> Shipped -> Delivered. Use lucide-react icons for each step.
flow_specific_instructions.4_post_delivery: Adapt UI based on risk. Low: display a subtle, automated silent timer. Medium: show a clear 'Confirm Delivery' button. High: render a multi-step verification form requiring an OTP input, an icon for video verification, and a checklist.
flow_specific_instructions.5_final_decision: Display the final payment resolution ('Payment Released' or 'Refunded') prominently using high-contrast typography. Accompany it with a data-dense, well-spaced Journey Summary Table to review the transaction history.
